LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL LANDLORD/TENANT MATTERS. JUDGE: RICHARD KRAMER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT FRANK YI, AS TRUSTEE OF THE FRANK AND SANDRA YI'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED, IN PART, AND OVERRULED, IN PART. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUDULENT CONCEALMENT. THIS CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED AND CHALLENGING THE VERACITY OF ALLEGATIONS IS NOT PROPER ON DEMURRER. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT TO ALLEGE DAMAGES TO SIGNATORY/BENEFICIARY UNDER THE LEASE. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven S. Nimoy, Esq. (805-497-7706) of Law Offices of Soltman, Levitt, Flaherty & Wattles LLP, for Frank Yi, Defendant and moving party / Jeffrey Nussbaum, Esq. (415-777-2220) of Nussbaum & Zigler, for Nussbaum Jeffrey, Plaintiff and opposing party

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT FRANK YI, AS TRUSTEE OF THE FRANK AND SANDRA YI's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently alleged. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven S. Nimoy, Esq. (805-497-7706) of Law Offices of Soltman, Levitt, Flaherty & Wattles LLP, for Frank Yi, Defendant and moving party / Jeffrey Nussbaum, Esq. (415-777-2220) of Nussbaum & Zigler, for Nussbaum Jeffrey, Plaintiff and opposing party

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT FRANK YI, AS TRUSTEE OF THE FRANK AND SANDRA YI's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED, in part, and OVERRULED, in part. Demurrer is OVERRULED as to first cause of action for fraudulent concealment. This cause of action is sufficiently alleged and challenging the veracity of allegations is not proper on demurrer. Demurrer is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to the second cause of action for breach of contract to allege damages to signatory/beneficiary under the Lease. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
